spec.precondition: requires valid(buf) && valid(buf->chunks) && forall i in 0..GGML_VBUFFER_MAX_CHUNKS: (buf->chunks[i] != NULL implies valid(buf->chunks[i]))
spec.postcondition: ensures forall i in 0..GGML_VBUFFER_MAX_CHUNKS: (buf->chunks[i] != NULL implies buf->chunks[i] is reset to its initial state, ready for reallocation)
